# Pull Request

## What changed
<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do? -->

## Why
<!-- The reasoning. What problem does this solve? What alternatives did you consider? -->

## How
<!-- Technical approach. Key decisions. Anything tricky? -->

## Phase
<!-- Which phase of the project plan does this belong to? E.g., "Phase 1.2 — DB setup" -->

## Concepts learned
<!-- What did you learn building this? Have you added an entry to NOTES.md? -->
- [ ] NOTES.md updated (if any new concept came up)

## Testing
<!-- How did you verify this works? -->
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Lint passes locally (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Manually verified the change end-to-end

## Things I deliberately broke to learn
<!-- Optional but encouraged. What did you intentionally break and what did you observe? -->

## Open questions
<!-- Anything you're unsure about and want to think more about / ask Claude about / revisit later? -->
